title: SMP Utils
description: All-in-one SMP balance plugin featuring item cooldowns, carry caps, combat tagging, TPA commands, and a fully configurable in-game GUI.
body:
# SMP Utils

  A comprehensive, lightweight utility plugin for SMP servers focused on PvP balance and quality-of-life features.

  ## Features

  ### ⚔️ Item Restrictions
  - **Cooldowns** - Mace, spear, totem, ender pearls, golden apples, wind charges
  - **Carry Limits** - Limit how many of each item players can hold
  - **Toggle Items** - Enable/disable elytra, end crystals, TNT minecarts, enchanted golden apples

  ### 🎯 Combat System
  - Combat tagging with configurable duration
  - Kill players who log out during combat
  - Block elytra, pearls, tridents, chorus fruit, and TP commands while tagged
  - Movement cancels pending teleports

  ### 🔮 Custom Restrictions
  - Add cooldowns, carry caps, or combat restrictions to **any item**
  - Set max enchantment levels or completely disable enchantments
  - Blocks restricted enchantments from villagers, enchanting tables, and anvils

  ### 🏠 Teleportation
  - `/tpa` and `/tpahere` with clickable accept/deny buttons
  - `/spawn` and `/home` commands with configurable delays
  - Movement cancels pending teleports

  ### ⚙️ Easy Configuration
  - In-game GUI to configure everything (`/smputils config`)
  - No server restart needed - changes apply instantly
  - All features can be toggled on/off

  ## Commands
  | Command | Description |
  |---------|-------------|
  | `/smputils` | Main plugin command |
  | `/smputils reload` | Reload configuration |
  | `/smputils config` | Open config GUI |
  | `/tpa <player>` | Request to teleport to a player |
  | `/tpahere <player>` | Request a player to teleport to you |
  | `/tpaccept` | Accept a teleport request |
  | `/tpdeny` | Deny a teleport request |
  | `/spawn` | Teleport to spawn |
  | `/setspawn` | Set the spawn location |
  | `/home [name]` | Teleport to a home |
  | `/sethome [name]` | Set a home |
  | `/delhome [name]` | Delete a home |
  | `/homes` | List your homes |

  ## Permissions
  All permissions default to OP. Use `smputils.bypass.*` to bypass all restrictions.
